title: rourea erecta
intro: Rourea erecta, also known as the "Rourea tree" or "Corkwood tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Connaraceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rourea erecta include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
